famous quote:
A winner is someone who recognizes their god-given talents, works their tail off to develop them into skills and uses these skills to accomplish their goals.
-Larry Bird
Interview Text:
Samuel G. 

(part 3)

I ask, "Are you ever wrong about hearing the voice?"

He says yeah, sometimes I'm wrong. He stops to think about a time and has a hard time because it has been so long. He whispers, "Holy Spirit, bring one back"

Finally he tells how he used to be part of a homeless ministry and one time he told a girl she was supposed to give her Bible away to one of the homeless. She said how attached she was to it but she gave it away. Later she was crying about it, and Samuel thought, 'Maybe I was wrong.'

"That's when I realized that sometimes the timing might be off. Sometimes I'm supposed to act on it, and other times I'm just supposed to pray about it. Like one time he felt like a friend had a demonic stronghold in one specific part of their thinking." Samuel told his friend about it and the friend received it very poorly. He lashed out at Samuel. Samuel thought, "Maybe I was just supposed to pray for him and wait for the opportunity to pray for it."
Music Video Instructions: Imagine God telling you this is how he loves you. The predictibility of maps, is not what God offers. He offers relationship.
